## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and why? Link any related issue (e.g. Closes #12). -->

## How tested

<!-- Commands run / manual steps. e.g. `cd server && mvn test`, `docker compose up --build`. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Focused change (one logical thing)
- [ ] `cd server && mvn test` passes
- [ ] `cd web && npm run build` passes (if frontend touched)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] No secrets / real hostnames / data committed
- [ ] Did not change the ingest contract (or discussed it first)
